case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. LADISLAU CARDALHO ET AL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-13-2021 CONTINUED TO SEP-14-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDALHO, LADISLAU $2,396.65 PRINCIPAL, $302.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,699.60, SEE SCANNED DOC
